backend.changelog: Manifest schema v2 — sha256 field added per artifact. No functional changes to runtime; parser groundwork for Phase 2 auto-apply.

cadBridge.changelog: Adds a SolidWorks/CATIA running-process warning to Setup.ps1 + the tray Apply Update / Rollback balloons. Heavy CAD sessions can hit file locks on the bundled interop DLLs during the file replacement step; the install now prints a yellow warning + pauses 5 seconds when it detects SLDWORKS, CNEXT, CATIA or 3DEXPERIENCE running so the failure mode is easy to triage. Non-blocking — most installs succeed even with CAD running. Also rolls forward 1.8.22's tray menu auto-refresh fix and 1.8.21's tray Rollback feature.
